name: Black Forest Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan over medium-low heat, melt the baking chocolate with sweetened condensed milk. Remove from heat and stir in the almond extract.
2. Pour into a large bowl; cool or chill thoroughly until smooth. Fold in the whipped cream.
3. Pour into the prepared pastry shell and chill for 4 hours or until set.
4. Serve with pie filling garnished with toasted almonds if desired. Refrigerate leftovers.
